description.overview: Known for their distinctive wrinkles and blue-black tongue, Shar-Pei are devoted, protective dogs who bond closely with their family but can be aloof with strangers.
description.temperament: Known for being loyal, independent, calm.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their short, harsh, bristly coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: Known for their distinctive wrinkles and blue-black tongue, Shar-Pei are devoted, protective dogs who bond closely with their family but can be aloof with strangers.
